## Description
Briefly describe the changes in this pull request.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (fixes #___)
- [ ] Enhancement (new feature)
- [ ] Breaking change

## Testing Performed
Describe the testing you performed to verify this change works correctly:
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Code style checks pass (`ruff check`, `mypy`)
- [ ] Tested manually in Home Assistant instance
- [ ] Verified in HACS or manual installation
- [ ] Checked with different zone types (lawn/drip)
- [ ] Tested with and without DWD forecast enabled

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (type hints, linting, formatting)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No breaking changes, or clearly documented if unavoidable
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
